---
applyTo: "README.md,docs/**/*.md,research/**/*.md"
---

# Docs and research instructions

- Preserve the CLI-first and docs/research-first scope boundary.
- Separate source-backed facts from design inference.
- Avoid positive claims of full parity with OMC or OMX; use bounded language such
  as "inspired by", "maps to", "illustrative", or "future extension" when
  appropriate.
- Keep root workspace, plugin package, and example workspace behavior distinct.
- Update references or verification notes when a capability claim changes.
- Run `./scripts/validate-doc-links.sh` after docs/research edits.
